results.rendered_html:
parvaṇī [parv-karaṇe lyuṭ striyāṃ ṅīp]
1 The full-moon day or the day of new moon.
2 A festival.
3 A particular disease of the juncture or saṃdhi of the eye (in medicine).
4 Filling.
